Further

Person · First seen 3307-01-13 · 9 mentions
Active: 3307-01-13 → 3307-03-29
Mentions Timeline (9 articles)
3307-03-29
Demands for Empire to Solve Terrorist Problem
The fear of Further starport bombings has placed internal and external pressure on the Empire to address the threat posed by the NMLA.
3307-03-18
Medical Supplies Needed for Starport Bombing Survivors
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Safeguard Interstellar requires deliveries of medicines to treat casualties from The NMLA’s recent terrorist attack.
3307-03-11
Nine Starports Hit by Terrorist Bombings
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Explosions have struck starports across The Alliance, Empire and Federation In a coordinated bombing attack by the NMLA.
3307-03-09
Thargoid Conflict Discussed at the Galactic Summit
Potential solutions to The threat posed by the Thargoid race are being debated at the diplomatic conference in The Sirius system.
3307-02-18
Victory for Federal Forces Against Jupiter Division
*Pilots Federation ALERT* Jupiter Division, The breakaway faction from Core Dynamics, has been defeated in the HIP 54530 system.
3307-02-15
Federation Damaged by Corruption and Conspiracy
Federal citizens are in uproar after The former CEO of Core Dynamics was revealed to have destroyed Starship One to increase company profits.
3307-02-05
Jupiter Rochester Named in Starship One Trial
Core Dynamics CEO Jupiter Rochester has been accused of collaborating With Fleet Admiral Vincent to orchestrate Starship One’s destruction in 3301.
3307-01-14
New Marlinist Systems Request Emergency Food Supplies
*Pilots Federation ALERT* The newly settled Marlinist Colonies have asked for urgent deliveries of foodstuffs.
3307-01-13
Core Dynamics Insider Discusses Lakon Takeover
An anonymous source within The shipbuilding corporation Core Dynamics has revealed details behind Its hostile takeover of Lakon Spaceways.
